text.title: WCAG 2.1 to 2.2 Migration Checklist
text.summary: Ordered checklist for migrating from WCAG 2.1 to 2.2, grouped by effort level, with axe-core version and manual-test requirements.

rule.statement: Use axe-core >= 4.8 for WCAG 2.2 rules; older versions lack target-size and focus-not-obscured rules, and still report the removed 4.1.1 Parsing.
rule.rationale: Pinning to an old version produces false negatives for new SC and false positives for the removed criterion.

list.item: Enable paste and autocomplete on all auth fields — set autocomplete="username" / "current-password"; never autocomplete="off". (3.3.8)
Add "Same as billing address" checkbox or pre-fill on checkout/profile forms. (3.3.7)
Ensure sticky headers do not fully obscure focused elements — add scroll-margin-top. (2.4.11)
Verify all click targets measure >= 24x24 CSS px in DevTools. (2.5.8)
Verify help link/chat widget appears in the same location across all pages. (3.2.6)
Add keyboard-button alternatives (up/down buttons, move-to-column dropdowns) to all drag-and-drop interactions. (2.5.7)
Pre-fill or omit any form field whose value was already provided earlier in the same session. (3.3.7)
Remove cognitive function tests from login: replace image CAPTCHA with behavioral/invisible CAPTCHA or passkeys. (3.3.8 / 3.3.9)
Audit multi-step forms for field repetition; consolidate or auto-populate. (3.3.7)
Implement passkey authentication (WebAuthn) — cleanly satisfies 3.3.8 and 3.3.9. (3.3.8 / 3.3.9 AAA)
Replace all image CAPTCHA with invisible reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha accessibility mode, or rate limiting. (3.3.9 AAA)
Full focus-visibility audit across all sticky elements (cookie banners, headers, toast notifications, chat widgets). (2.4.11 / 2.4.12 AAA)

section.title: Manual Testing Required

rule.statement: The following WCAG 2.2 criteria cannot be verified by automated tools alone and require structured manual testing.
rule.rationale: axe-core covers target-size and partial focus-not-obscured; drag alternatives, redundant entry, consistent help, and authentication require human walkthroughs of real interaction flows.

section.reference: Playwright + axe automation for 2.5.8 target size and 2.5.7 drag alternative checks

list.item: 2.4.11 Focus Not Obscured: manually scroll each page with keyboard, observe whether sticky elements hide focused items.
2.5.7 Dragging Movements: try every drag interaction; confirm button alternatives work independently.
3.2.6 Consistent Help: navigate at least 5 pages; verify help mechanism relative position is unchanged.
3.3.7 Redundant Entry: complete each multi-step form flow end to end; check no field is asked twice unnecessarily.
3.3.8 Accessible Authentication: test login with a password manager (1Password, Bitwarden); confirm paste works.
